## Epic 5 — Magic System (#56)

**Dependency:** #50, #51
**Est. Effort:** Extra Large

### Goal
Design and write spell chains for 4th-5th level equivalent spells.

### Chains to Design
| Chain Name | Master (4th-level) | Master+ (5th-level) | Dice Req |
|------------|-------------------|---------------------|----------|
| Fire Magic | Wall of Fire | Immolation | 3 Fire |
| Ice Magic | Ice Storm | Cone of Cold | 3 Water |
| Lightning | Storm Sphere | Chain Lightning (prep) | 3 Wind |
| Healing | Aura of Life | Mass Cure Wounds | 3 Animal |
| Protection | Stoneskin | Wall of Force | 3 Protection |
| Charm | Compulsion | Dominate Person | 3 Guile |
| Illusion | Greater Invisibility | Mislead | 3 Wind + 1 Guile |
| Necromancy | Blight | Cloudkill | 3 Energy |
| Conjuration | Dimension Door | Teleportation Circle | 3 Energy |
| Transmutation | Polymorph | Animate Objects | 3 Reason |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design 20-25 spells at Master/Master+ tier
- [ ] Write each with Weak/Standard/Strong effects
- [ ] Escalate dice prerequisites (3-4 specific dice)
- [ ] Write as formatted AsciiDoc entries
